title: Vegan Pak Choi Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful vegan stir fry made with pak choi and served with a side of fried rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of canola oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the pak choi to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it starts to wilt.
Stir in the fried rice and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the rice is heated through.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
